topics: Mesh and node analysis of network containing independent and dependent sources. Supermesh and Supernode analysis. Steady-state AC analysis using Mesh and Node analysis
Maximum power transfer theorem. (applied to both dc and ac circuits having dependent source). Review of Laplace Transforms and Inverse Laplace Transforms
Initial value theorem & Final value theorem
Transformation of basic signals and circuits into s-domain

step and sinusoidal inputs (with and without initial conditions). Network functions for the single port and two port network. Properties of driving point and transfer functions. Significance of Poles and Zeros of network functions
Time domain response from pole zero plot. Impulse Function & Response. Network functions in the sinusoidal steady state
Impedance, Admittance, Transmission and Hybrid parameters of two port network
Series and parallel connections of two port networks
Reciprocal and Symmetrical two port network
Characteristic impedance, Image impedance and propagation constant (derivation not required
